description_long: This object consists of a pre-filled syringe and a rectangular cardboard box labeled 'Dupixent 300 mg'. The syringe is made of translucent plastic with a plunger and a protective needle cap, designed for single-use subcutaneous injection. The box is predominantly white and green, featuring detailed pharmaceutical labeling, branding, and dosage information. The Sanofi logo is visible on the lower right corner of the box, and the product name 'Dupixent' is prominently displayed in bold letters. The packaging is clean and professional, with clear demarcation between the syringe and the box. The overall appearance suggests a high-quality, sterile medical product intended for clinical or home healthcare use.
description: A pre-filled plastic syringe and a white-green cardboard box labeled 'Dupixent 300 mg', featuring clear pharmaceutical branding and dosage information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the syringe partially outside the box, with the 'Dupixent 300 mg' label and Sanofi logo clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the circular end of the syringe plunger and the narrow side of the box with branding text.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the full length of the box with the syringe mostly hidden, and the product name and instructions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the syringe and the side panel of the box with branding and text.
